arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Kim Min-jae out injured for weeks, confirms Vincent Kompany
arts.sum: At the pre-match press conference before the Bundesliga clash against Union Berlin, Kompany said that Kim will “be out the next few weeks.” Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany announced that Kim Min-jae will be out injured for the time being.

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich on contract extension: "Munich has become our home"
arts.sum: Bayern Munich's Joshua Kimmich revealed all in his latest interview with Suddeutsche Zeitung.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl and Christoph Freund want “two players for each position” next season, could result in multiple sales
arts.sum: According to Sport Bild’s Tobi Altschäffl (via @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich sporting director Christoph Freund and board member for sport Max Eberl share the sentiment of depth as the pair prepare the squad for the upcoming season. In their planning for next season, Max Eberl and Christoph Freund want a squad with two players for each position.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany doesn’t promise rotation for Bayern Munich ahead of Union Berlin match
arts.sum: Heading to Union Berlin might look like an easy match on paper, but Kompany would beg to differ. Union Berlin will be without manager Steffen Baumgart due to a suspension, but Kompany leaned on an old American adage to say that Baumgart’s absence will play a role, but is ultimately up to the players’ performance — It’s not the X’s and the O’s, but the Jimmys and the Joes that make the difference.

arts.ttl: Kane delighted with Kimmich's contract extension
arts.sum: The English marksman expressed his delight after Joshua Kimmich decided to pen a new deal at the Bavarian giants.

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: Is Bayern Munich’s plan to get Florian Wirtz in motion? A tale of possible red herrings, halted construction, & tin foil hats galore; Throwing it back to Kenny Wayne Shepherd; Finals thoughts on Invincible; Bundesliga predictions; &MORE!
arts.sum: First, Sport Bild journalists Christian Falk and Tobi Altschäffl (via @iMiaSanMia ) are reporting that Bayern Munich has hit the pause button a training ground renovation, which will — at least — delay an expense of at least €150 million: Bayern Munich has one more game before it will hit an international break — and there is much to talk about, so let’s not waste any time.

arts.ttl: Neuer takes step forward in recovery from injury
arts.sum: Injured Bayern Munich goalkeeper Manuel Neuer has returned to light running training.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel keeps Harry Kane as captain as England target winning 2026 World Cup
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star faced criticism for Three Lions performances during run to Euro 2024 final

arts.ttl: Union Berlin vs Bayern München preview: League leaders look to bounce back
arts.sum: League leaders Bayern München are looking to get back to winning ways in the Bundesliga as they travel to Köpenick to face Union Berlin.

arts.ttl: Three factors that made Joshua Kimmich extend his contract with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich has agreed to a contract extension with Bayern Munich until the end of the 2028/29 season. In his interview with FC Bayern (via @iMiaSanMia ), Kimmich said, ”There were many reasons that made me extend my contract.
